title: The relevance of the actual dead sea scrolls
display_title: The relevance of the actual dead sea scrolls
wikitext:
[]: The relevance of the actual dead sea scrolls             Quote Post by facespace » Thu Aug 05, 2010 1:40 pm The dead sea scrolls are a collection of about 900 documents found in caves along the west bank and dead sea. What is the relevance of the dead sea scrolls found in the middle east to the dead sea scrolls in the tv shows?

[]: Re: The relevance of the actual dead sea scrolls             Quote Post by drinian » Thu Aug 05, 2010 1:55 pm facespace wrote: The dead sea scrolls are a collection of about 900 documents found in caves along the west bank and dead sea. What is the relevance of the dead sea scrolls found in the middle east to the dead sea scrolls in the tv shows?

[]: Re: The relevance of the actual dead sea scrolls             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Fri Aug 06, 2010 1:04 am facespace wrote: What is the relevance of the dead sea scrolls found in the middle east to the dead sea scrolls in the tv shows?

[]: Re: The relevance of the actual dead sea scrolls             Quote Post by Lucretius » Fri Aug 06, 2010 1:18 am SaltyJoe wrote: Absolutely nothing.
